title: As a POS user, I want to securely log in and out of the system.
description: This story covers the ability for users (e.g., cashiers, managers) to create an account, log in, maintain a secure session, and log out, ensuring only authorized personnel can access the POS functionalities.
acceptance_criteria: Users can successfully sign up for a new account.
Users can log in with valid credentials.
Users receive an error message for invalid login attempts.
Users can log out of the system.
User sessions are securely managed.

title: As a POS manager, I want to manage products and their stock levels.
description: This story enables managers to add new products, update existing product details (name, price), view the entire product catalog, and adjust inventory stock levels to reflect physical counts or deliveries.
acceptance_criteria: Managers can view a list of all products.
Managers can search and filter products.
Managers can add new products with name, price, and initial stock.
Managers can edit existing product details.
Managers can view current stock levels for each product.
Managers can manually adjust stock levels for any product.

title: As a cashier, I want to process sales transactions efficiently.
description: This story focuses on the core sales workflow, allowing cashiers to add products to a shopping cart, modify quantities, remove items, and complete the checkout process to generate a receipt for the customer.
acceptance_criteria: Cashiers can add products to the shopping cart.
Cashiers can increase or decrease the quantity of items in the cart.
Cashiers can remove items from the cart.
Cashiers can view the total price of items in the cart.
Cashiers can finalize a sale and process the checkout.
Upon successful checkout, a digital receipt is generated.

title: As a POS user, I want to view past sales and receipts.
description: This story provides the ability for authorized users to look up previous transactions, view detailed receipts, and review the history of sales made through the POS system.
acceptance_criteria: Users can view a list of all past sales orders.
Users can view the detailed receipt for any specific past order.
Receipts include product names, quantities, prices, and total amount.
